Effects of Epithelial Programs ~ Clusters and Treatments

M. Muzamil Khan

2024-02-29

.libPaths("/restricted/projectnb/montilab-p/personal/mmkhan/R/4.1/")
PATH <- "/restricted/projectnb/montilab-p/projects/oralcancer/4nqo/"

library(Seurat)
## Attaching SeuratObject
library(dplyr)
## 
## Attaching package: 'dplyr'
## The following objects are masked from 'package:stats':
## 
##     filter, lag
## The following objects are masked from 'package:base':
## 
##     intersect, setdiff, setequal, union
library(ggplot2)
#library(lme4)
library(emmeans)
library(gtsummary)

Load data

Load epithelial seurat object

e7386_epi <- readRDS(file = file.path(PATH, "mmkhan_e7386/data/2023_01_09_e7386_epi.rds"))

Load GSVA scores

gsva_res_all <- data.frame(t(readRDS(file = file.path(PATH,"mmkhan_e7386/results/2023_11_20_gsva_nqo_epi_e7386_all_sct.RDS"))))

LME

Effect of cell program on each cluster using cells per cluster as a random effect. GSVA per cluster for epi. programs(stress etc) ~ seurat_clusters + (1|cell); cell id as a random effect for each fixed cluster and no intercept

.reverselog_trans <- function(base=exp(1)) {
    trans <- function(x) -log(x, base)
    inv <- function(x) base^(-x)
    scales::trans_new(paste0("reverselog-", format(base)), trans, inv, 
              scales::log_breaks(base=base), 
              domain=c(1e-100, Inf))
}


lme_wrapper <- function(Y, dat) {

        lmer_fit <- lmerTest::lmer(dat[, Y] ~ 0 + seurat_clusters +  (1|sample), data = dat)
        return(lmer_fit)
}

lme_df <- gsva_res_all[,c('Stress', "Epithelial_Differentiation_1", "Epithelial_Differentiation_2", "pEMT", "HALLMARK_EPITHELIAL_MESENCHYMAL_TRANSITION", "Cell_Cycle", "e7386_25.vs.nqo.dn", "e7386_50.vs.nqo.dn"), drop = FALSE]
lme_df <- dplyr::rename(lme_df, "Diff1"="Epithelial_Differentiation_1", "Diff2"="Epithelial_Differentiation_2", "EMT"="HALLMARK_EPITHELIAL_MESENCHYMAL_TRANSITION", "CC"="Cell_Cycle")
lme_df$seurat_clusters <- e7386_epi$seurat_clusters[match(colnames(e7386_epi), rownames(lme_df))]
lme_df$treatment <- e7386_epi$treatment[match(colnames(e7386_epi), rownames(lme_df))]
lme_df$sample <- e7386_epi$sample[match(colnames(e7386_epi), rownames(lme_df))]
lme_df$cell_id <- e7386_epi$cell_id[match(colnames(e7386_epi), rownames(lme_df))]

#levels(lme_df$seurat_clusters) <- labels_ordered
lm1 <- lme_wrapper(Y = "Stress", dat = lme_df)
lm2 <- lme_wrapper(Y = "Diff1", dat = lme_df)
lm3 <- lme_wrapper(Y = "Diff2", dat = lme_df)
lm4 <- lme_wrapper(Y = "pEMT", dat = lme_df)
lm5 <- lme_wrapper(Y = "EMT", dat = lme_df)
lm6 <- lme_wrapper(Y = "CC", dat = lme_df)

add confidence intervals and q-values

ci_qval <- function(lm_fit) {
  lm_df <- data.frame(summary(lm_fit)$coefficients)
  lm_df$qval <- p.adjust(lm_df$Pr...t.., method = "fdr")
  lm_df <- cbind(lm_df, confint(lm1, level = 0.95)[3:16, ])
  return(lm_df)
}

lm1_df <- ci_qval(lm1)
## Computing profile confidence intervals ...
lm2_df <- ci_qval(lm2)
## Computing profile confidence intervals ...
lm3_df <- ci_qval(lm3)
## Computing profile confidence intervals ...
lm4_df <- ci_qval(lm4)
## Computing profile confidence intervals ...
lm5_df <- ci_qval(lm5)
## Computing profile confidence intervals ...
lm6_df <- ci_qval(lm6)
## Computing profile confidence intervals ...
lm_dfs_mod <- list(lm1_df, lm2_df, lm3_df, lm4_df, lm5_df, lm6_df)
#saveRDS(lm_dfs_mod, file.path(PATH, "mmkhan_e7386/results/05_08_lm_df_epi_clusters_wO_int.rds"))

Read Dfs

lm_dfs_mod <- readRDS(file.path(PATH, "mmkhan_e7386/results/05_08_lm_df_epi_clusters_wO_int.rds"))

Epi. progs. estimates

05/08 Fig 3C

lm_dfs_mod[[1]]$group <- rep(nrow(lm_dfs_mod[[1]]), x = "Stress")
lm_dfs_mod[[1]]$clust <- seq_along(1:14)
lm_dfs_mod[[1]]$est_mod <- scale(lm_dfs_mod[[1]]$Estimate)

lm_dfs_mod[[2]]$group <- rep(nrow(lm_dfs_mod[[2]]), x = "Diff.1")
lm_dfs_mod[[2]]$clust <- seq_along(1:14)
lm_dfs_mod[[2]]$est_mod <- scale(lm_dfs_mod[[2]]$Estimate)

lm_dfs_mod[[3]]$group <- rep(nrow(lm_dfs_mod[[3]]), x = "Diff.2")
lm_dfs_mod[[3]]$clust <- seq_along(1:14)
lm_dfs_mod[[3]]$est_mod <- scale(lm_dfs_mod[[3]]$Estimate)

lm_dfs_mod[[4]]$group <- rep(nrow(lm_dfs_mod[[4]]), x = "pEMT")
lm_dfs_mod[[4]]$clust <- seq_along(1:14)
lm_dfs_mod[[4]]$est_mod <- scale(lm_dfs_mod[[4]]$Estimate)

lm_dfs_mod[[5]]$group <- rep(nrow(lm_dfs_mod[[5]]), x = "EMT")
lm_dfs_mod[[5]]$clust <- seq_along(1:14)
lm_dfs_mod[[5]]$est_mod <- scale(lm_dfs_mod[[5]]$Estimate)

lm_dfs_mod[[6]]$group <- rep(nrow(lm_dfs_mod[[6]]), x = "Cell Cycle")
lm_dfs_mod[[6]]$clust <- seq_along(1:14)
lm_dfs_mod[[6]]$est_mod <- scale(lm_dfs_mod[[6]]$Estimate)

lm_df_rb <- rbind(lm_dfs_mod[[1]], lm_dfs_mod[[2]], lm_dfs_mod[[3]], lm_dfs_mod[[4]], lm_dfs_mod[[5]], lm_dfs_mod[[6]])
lm_df_rb$group <- factor(lm_df_rb$group, levels = c("Stress", "EMT", "pEMT", "Diff.1", "Diff.2", "Cell Cycle"))


l <- lm_df_rb %>%
    ggplot() +
    geom_point(aes(x=factor(clust), y=group, color=est_mod, size=qval)) +
    ggplot2::geom_vline(xintercept = 0, color = "red", linetype = "dashed", cex = 1,  alpha = 0.5) +
    scale_size_continuous(trans = c("log10", "reverse"), name = "qval")+
    scale_color_gradient2(low = "blue", mid = "white", high = "red3", name= "Estimates")+
    ggplot2::scale_y_discrete(limits=rev)+
    
    theme_bw() +
    ggplot2::theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size=15, family = "Arial", face="bold"),
                   axis.text.y = element_text( size=15, family = "Arial", face="bold"),
                   axis.title.y = element_text( size=18, family = "Arial"),
                  axis.title.x = element_text(size=18, family = "Arial"))+
        xlab("Clusters")+ ylab("Epithelial Programs")
## Warning: Using `size` aesthetic for lines was deprecated in ggplot2 3.4.0.
## ℹ Please use `linewidth` instead.
## This warning is displayed once every 8 hours.
## Call `lifecycle::last_lifecycle_warnings()` to see where this warning was
## generated.
l 

#ggsave(plot = l, filename = file.path(PATH, "mmkhan_e7386/results/e7386_images/05_08_epi_clust_pgms.png"), width = 10, height = 5, dpi = 300)
#ggsave(plot = l, filename = file.path(PATH, "mmkhan_e7386/results/e7386_images/07_18_epi_clust_pgms.png"), width = 6.5, height = 3, dpi = 300)

Stress estimates

new fig 3D

ci_plot_wrapper1 <- function(lm_df, xlab) {
  
  df_ci <- data.frame(lm_df, 
                      cluster=factor(seq_along(1:14)))
  df_ci <- dplyr::rename(df_ci, "ci_low"="X2.5..", "ci_high"="X97.5..")
  
  df_ci$qval_mod <- ifelse(df_ci$qval <= 0.05 & df_ci$qval >= 0.01,"*", 
                          ifelse(df_ci$qval<=0.01, "***", "NS"))
  
  df_ci$label <- paste(round(df_ci$Estimate, 3), df_ci$qval_mod, sep = ",")

  plot1 <-  ggplot2::ggplot(df_ci,  ggplot2::aes(y = cluster, x = Estimate)) +
   ggplot2::geom_point(shape = 18, size = 5,  ggplot2::aes(x = Estimate, y = cluster, colour = Estimate >0)) +
   ggplot2::scale_colour_manual(name = 'Estimate > 0', values = setNames(c('red','blue'),c(T, F))) +  
   ggplot2::geom_errorbarh( ggplot2::aes(xmin = ci_low, xmax = ci_high), height = 0.25) +
   ggplot2::geom_vline(xintercept = 0, color = "red", linetype = "dashed", cex = 1,  alpha = 0.5) +
   ggplot2::scale_y_discrete(limits=rev)+
    ggrepel::geom_label_repel( ggplot2::aes(label=label),position = "identity",
                       label.size = 0,  
                       #label.padding=.1, 
                       #na.rm=TRUE,
                       fill = ggplot2:: alpha(c("white"),0.5))+
   ggplot2::xlab(xlab) + 
   ggplot2::ylab(" ") + 
   ggplot2::theme_bw() +
   ggplot2::theme(panel.border =  ggplot2::element_blank(),
        panel.background =  ggplot2::element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major =  ggplot2::element_blank(), 
        panel.grid.minor =  ggplot2::element_blank(), 
        axis.line =  ggplot2::element_line(colour = "black"),
        axis.text.y =  ggplot2::element_text(size = 12, colour = "black"),
        axis.text.x.bottom =  ggplot2::element_text(size = 12, colour = "black"),
        axis.title.x =  ggplot2::element_text(size = 12, colour = "black"))
plot1
}

c <- ci_plot_wrapper1(lm_df = lm_dfs_mod[[1]], xlab = "Stress Estimates")+ NoLegend()
c

#ggsave(plot = c, filename = file.path(PATH, "mmkhan_e7386/results/e7386_images/05_10_fig3d_new.png"), width = 5, height = 6.5, dpi = 300)

EMM

Raw means doesn’t take into account the number of observations in the group, EMM does that! Also, EMM can be applied to complex models such as one with interaction effects.

cluster*trt effect on cell-type abundance by estimated marginal means

library(emmeans)
df1 <- data.frame(e7386_epi@meta.data[, c('sample', 'treatment', 'seurat_clusters')])
# count number of cells per sample
df2 <- df1 %>% 
  group_by(sample, seurat_clusters, treatment) %>%
  summarise(number = n())
## `summarise()` has grouped output by 'sample', 'seurat_clusters'. You can
## override using the `.groups` argument.
# add total number of cells per sample
cells_sample <- df1 %>% 
  group_by(sample) %>%
  summarise(totalcells = n())

combdf <- merge(df2, cells_sample, by = 'sample', all = T)

# final_df <- combdf %>%
#   mutate(proportion = number/totalcells)

final_df <- combdf %>%
  mutate(Other = totalcells-number)

model0 <- glm(
  formula = cbind(number, Other) ~ seurat_clusters,
  family = binomial(link = 'logit'),
  data = final_df
)

#simple
emm0 <- emmeans(model0, specs = ~ seurat_clusters)
emm0 %>%
  summary(infer = TRUE, type = 'response') %>%
  arrange(prob) -> cell_type_probs

final_df %>% pull(number) %>% sum -> N
final_df %>% 
  group_by(seurat_clusters) %>% 
  summarise(fraction = sum(number) / N) %>% 
  arrange(fraction) %>% 
  as.data.frame -> cell_type_fractions

Control vs 4nqo

final_df_ctrl <- final_df %>% filter(treatment %in% c('control','4NQO control'))

formula = as.formula(cbind(number, Other) ~ seurat_clusters * treatment)
model1 <- glm(formula = formula, family = 'binomial', data = final_df_ctrl)

emm1 <- emmeans(model1, specs = revpairwise ~  treatment | seurat_clusters)
emm1$contrasts %>%
  summary(infer = TRUE, type = 'response') %>%
  #rbind() %>%
  as.data.frame() -> c_results1
c_results1
## seurat_clusters = 1:
##  contrast               odds.ratio        SE  df asymp.LCL asymp.UCL null

##  z.ratio p.value
##  -24.292  <.0001

##  z.ratio p.value
##       NA      NA

##  4NQO control / control   1.579684 0.1426092 Inf  1.323507  1.885446    1
##  z.ratio p.value
##    5.065  <.0001
## 
## seurat_clusters = 12:
##  contrast               odds.ratio        SE  df asymp.LCL asymp.UCL null
##  4NQO control / control   3.164592 0.2881594 Inf  2.647339  3.782909    1
##  z.ratio p.value
##   12.652  <.0001
## 
## seurat_clusters = 13:
##  contrast               odds.ratio        SE  df asymp.LCL asymp.UCL null
##  4NQO control / control   1.149301 0.1469671 Inf  0.894512  1.476662    1
##  z.ratio p.value
##    1.088  0.2765
## 
## seurat_clusters = 14:
##  contrast               odds.ratio        SE  df asymp.LCL asymp.UCL null
##  4NQO control / control   0.291608 0.0478940 Inf  0.211347  0.402348    1
##  z.ratio p.value
##   -7.503  <.0001
## 
## Confidence level used: 0.95 
## Intervals are back-transformed from the log odds ratio scale 
## Tests are performed on the log odds ratio scale
df_res <- data.frame(cluster=c_results1$seurat_clusters, 
                     or=c_results1$odds.ratio, 
                     lower=c_results1$asymp.LCL, 
                     upper=c_results1$asymp.UCL, 
                     p_val=c_results1$p.value)
df_res$pval_mod <- ifelse(df_res$p_val <= 0.05 & df_res$p_val >= 0.01,"*", 
                         ifelse(df_res$p_val<=0.01, "***", "NS"))
df_res$label <- paste(round(df_res$or, 3), df_res$pval_mod, sep = ",")

plot2 <- ggplot(df_res, aes(y = cluster, x = or)) +
  geom_point(shape = 18, size = 5) +
  geom_errorbarh(aes(xmin = lower, xmax = upper), height = 0.25) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 1, color = "red", linetype = "dashed", cex = 1, alpha = 0.5) +
  scale_y_discrete(limits=rev)+
  ggrepel::geom_label_repel(aes(label=label), nudge_x = 0.0, nudge_y = 0.25,
                       label.size = 0,  
                       #label.padding=.1, 
                       #na.rm=TRUE,
                       fill = alpha(c("white"),0.5))+
  xlab("Odds Ratio of 4-NQO Control \n vs. Control") + 
  ylab(" ") + 
  theme_bw() +
  theme(panel.border = element_blank(),
        panel.background = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(), 
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(), 
        axis.line = element_line(colour = "black"),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12, colour = "black"),
        axis.text.x.bottom = element_text(size = 12, colour = "black"),
        axis.title.x = element_text(size = 12, colour = "black"))
plot2
## Warning: Removed 1 rows containing missing values (`geom_point()`).

#ggsave(plot = plot2, filename = file.path(PATH, "mmkhan_e7386/results/e7386_images/figs_3f_ctrl.png"), width = 8, height = 8, dpi = 300)

E7386 vs 4nqo

final_df_non_ctrl <- final_df %>% filter(treatment!="control")
final_df_non_ctrl$treatment_mod <- recode(final_df_non_ctrl$treatment, '4NQO + E7386; 25 mg/kg' = 'E7386', '4NQO+ E7386; 50 mg/kg'= 'E7386')
final_df_non_ctrl$treatment_mod <- factor(final_df_non_ctrl$treatment_mod, levels = c("4NQO control", "E7386"))
final_df_non_ctrl$dose <- factor(ifelse(final_df_non_ctrl$treatment == "4NQO + E7386; 25 mg/kg", 1, 
                                 ifelse(final_df_non_ctrl$treatment == "4NQO+ E7386; 50 mg/kg", 2, 0)))

formula = as.formula(cbind(number, Other) ~ seurat_clusters * treatment_mod)
model1 <- glm(formula = formula, family = 'binomial', data = final_df_non_ctrl)

emm1 <- emmeans(model1, specs = revpairwise ~  treatment_mod | seurat_clusters)
emm1$contrasts %>%
  summary(infer = TRUE, type = 'response') %>%
  #rbind() %>%
  as.data.frame() -> c_results1
c_results1

## Intervals are back-transformed from the log odds ratio scale 
## Tests are performed on the log odds ratio scale
df_res <- data.frame(cluster=c_results1$seurat_clusters, 
                     or=c_results1$odds.ratio, 
                     lower=c_results1$asymp.LCL, 
                     upper=c_results1$asymp.UCL, 
                     p_val=c_results1$p.value)
df_res$pval_mod <- ifelse(df_res$p_val <= 0.05 & df_res$p_val >= 0.01,"*", 
                         ifelse(df_res$p_val<=0.01, "***", "NS"))
df_res$label <- paste(round(df_res$or, 3), df_res$pval_mod, sep = ",")

plot3 <- ggplot(df_res, aes(y = cluster, x = or)) +
  geom_point(shape = 18, size = 5) +
  geom_errorbarh(aes(xmin = lower, xmax = upper), height = 0.25) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 1, color = "red", linetype = "dashed", cex = 1, alpha = 0.5) +
  scale_y_discrete(limits=rev)+
  ggrepel::geom_label_repel(aes(label=label), nudge_x = 0.0, nudge_y = 0.25,
                       label.size = 0,  
                       #label.padding=.1, 
                       #na.rm=TRUE,
                       fill = alpha(c("white"),0.5))+
  xlab("Odds Ratio of E7386 (combined) \n vs. 4-NQO Control") + 
  ylab(" ") + 
  theme_bw() +
  theme(panel.border = element_blank(),
        panel.background = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(), 
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(), 
        axis.line = element_line(colour = "black"),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12, colour = "black"),
        axis.text.x.bottom = element_text(size = 12, colour = "black"),
        axis.title.x = element_text(size = 12, colour = "black"))
plot3

#ggsave(plot = plot2, filename = file.path(PATH, "mmkhan_e7386/results/e7386_images/01_30_clust_or.png"), width = 6, height = 8, dpi = 300)

Combine all [Fig. 3E,F]

g <- ggpubr::ggarrange(c, plot2, plot3, ncol = 3, nrow = 1, align = "h")
## Warning: Removed 1 rows containing missing values (`geom_point()`).
## Warning: Removed 1 rows containing missing values (`geom_errorbarh()`).
## Warning: Removed 1 rows containing missing values (`geom_label_repel()`).
g
